ext_description.message: Automatically prepends the current time to AI chat messages before sending.

format_hint.message:
YYYY year · MM month · DD day
HH hour · mm min · ss sec

format_error_no_token.message: ⚠ Must include at least one of: YYYY MM DD HH mm ss

format_error_save.message: ⚠ Cannot save: no date/time token found
